query: SELECT c.name as categoria, c.isActive, COUNT(p.id) as produtos FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 210001 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT c.name as categoria, c.isActive, COUNT(p.id) as produtos FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 210001 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sortOrder;
